Off Calendar May-27-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Michael Astanehe (415-226-7170; mastanehe@astanehelaw.com) of Astanehe Law for Plaintiff, Betsy Ponce.
Alex Moore (9250939-2000; amoore@lee-lawfirm.com) of Lee, Landrum, Marking & Ingle, APC for Defendant, Avlah Contractors, Inc.
Richard Semon (714-384-6600; rsemon@aguileragroup.com) of The Aguilera Law Group, APLC for Defendant, Pacific Gas and Electric Company.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT ALVAH CONTRACTORS, INC.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Supplemental Interrogatory is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem will issue an order with ruling.

Off Calendar May-27-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MICHAEL M. ASTANEHE, Esq. of Astanehe Law (Tel: 415-226-7170) for plaintiff;
Atty. RCHARD A. SEMON, Esq. of the Aguilera Law Group, APLC (Tel: 714-384-6600) for defendant Pacific Gas and Electric Company;
Atty. ALEXANDER R. MOORE, Esq. of Lee, Landrum, Marking & Ingle, APC (Tel: 925-939-2000) for defendant Avlah Contractors, Inc.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY AND ALVAH CONTRACTORS, INC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Answers To Deposition Questions.

Parties stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for parties authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted.

The Court takes the matter under submission.

The parties are to email a joint protective order to the Judge Pro Tem at Peter.Catalanotti@wilsonelser.com by noon on 5/20/21.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
